testcase.name: PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · P00 login (4 cases) › PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 happy: test@example.com + Test@1234 → /home
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · P00 login (4 cases) › PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 wrong_password → inline 邮箱或密码错误
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · P00 login (4 cases) › PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 wrong_email → same 邮箱或密码错误 (prevent enumeration)
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · P00 login (4 cases) › PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 lockout: 5 connectives wrong → 账号已锁定 · 5 分钟后重试
testcase.system-out:
[[ATTACHMENT|test-results/auth-login-PHASE-A-LOGIN-H-2386a-ves-wrong-→-账号已锁定-·-5-分钟后重试-chromium/test-failed-1.png]]
[[ATTACHMENT|test-results/auth-login-PHASE-A-LOGIN-H-2386a-ves-wrong-→-账号已锁定-·-5-分钟后重试-chromium/error-context.md]]
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth/login.spec.ts:109:3 › PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · P00 login (4 cases) › PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 lockout: 5 connectives wrong → 账号已锁定 · 5 分钟后重试 Error: expect(locator).toHaveText(expected) failed Locator: getByTestId('p00-error-inline') Expected: "账号已锁定 · 5 分钟后重试" Received: "邮箱或密码错误" Timeout: 5000ms Call log: - Expect "toHaveText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByTestId('p00-error-inline') 6 × locator resolved to
邮箱或密码错误
- unexpected value "邮箱或密码错误" 124 | await page.getByTestId(TID.password).fill('wrongPass!5'); 125 | await page.getByTestId(TID.loginBtn).click(); > 126 | await expect(page.getByTestId(TID.errorInline)).toHaveText('账号已锁定 · 5 分钟后重试', { | ^ 127 | timeout: 5000, 128 | }); 129 | at /Users/allen/workspace/longfeng/.claude/worktrees/nifty-kepler-3deb2c/frontend/apps/h5/tests/e2e/auth/login.spec.ts:126:53 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/auth-login-PHASE-A-LOGIN-H-2386a-ves-wrong-→-账号已锁定-·-5-分钟后重试-chromium/test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ../../test-results/auth-login-PHASE-A-LOGIN-H-2386a-ves-wrong-→-账号已锁定-·-5-分钟后重试-chromium/error-context.md
